ecarx.carext.security.biometrics.face

Interface IFaceManager.RemovalCallback

  • Enclosing interface:
    IFaceManager

    public static interface IFaceManager.RemovalCallback
    Callback structure provided to IFaceManager.removeAll(java.lang.String, ecarx.carext.security.biometrics.face.IFaceManager.RemovalCallback). Users of IFaceManager may optionally provide an implementation of this to IFaceManager.removeAll(String, RemovalCallback) for listening to face template removal events.
    Since:
    6

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onRemovalError(Face face, int errMsgId, java.lang.CharSequence errString)
      Called when the given face can't be removed.
      void onRemovalSucceeded(Face face, int remaining)
      Called when a given face is successfully removed.

    • Method Detail

      • onRemovalError

        void onRemovalError(@Nullable
                    Face face,
                    int errMsgId,
                    @NonNull
                    java.lang.CharSequence errString)
        Called when the given face can't be removed.
        Parameters:
        face - The face that the call attempted to remove
        errMsgId - An associated error message id
        errString - An error message indicating why the face id can't be removed
        Since:
        6

      • onRemovalSucceeded

        void onRemovalSucceeded(@Nullable
                        Face face,
                        int remaining)
        Called when a given face is successfully removed.
        Parameters:
        face - The face template that was removed.
        Since:
        6
